response.overview: The works of Daniel O'Donnell have seen him crossover from a folk-based Irish singer to a superstar capable of drawing a crowd all over the world.  1 Softly and Tenderly  2 Sweet Victory  3 Here I Am Lord  4 Make Me A Channel Of Your Peace  5 Put Your Hand In The Hand  6 Nearer My God To Thee  7 Only A Shadow Of Your Love  8 I Saw The Light  9 God Be With You Till We Meet Again  10 You Raise Me Up  11 Will The Circle Be Unbroken (duet w/ Mary Duff)  12 Sweet Queen Of Peace  13 The Wind Beneath My Wings  14 Footsteps  15 I Watch The Sunrise  16 My Forever Friend  17 He's Got The Whole World In His Hands (Mary Duff)  18 Let There Be Peace  19 When Darkness Falls  20 Open Up The Pearly Gates / We Shall Not Be Moved  21 Lady of Knock  22 Surely The Presence Of The Lord Is In This Place / May God's Blessings Surround You Each Day  23 One Day At A Time  24 Panis Angelicus  25 At The End Of The Day  26 The Rivers Babylon  27 Battle Hymn Of The Republic
response.title: Daniel O'Donnell: Songs of Faith
